records.content:
Comprehensive Overview of Quantum Serverless: Elastic Integration of Quantum and Classical Computing This Jupyter Book lets you interact with a code. You can change the code by inline on the pages or launch a MyBinder session to run your code in a Jupyter Notebook in another tab. The figures are made interactive using [Plotly](https://plotly.com).
